result.stdout:
Description:
  MauiDevFlow CLI - automate MAUI apps via Agent API and Blazor WebViews via CDP

Usage:
  MauiDevFlow.CLI [command] [options]

Options:
  -ap, --agent-port <agent-port>  Agent HTTP port (auto-discovered via broker, .mauidevflow, or default 9223) [default: 9223]
  -ah, --agent-host <agent-host>  Agent HTTP host [default: localhost]
  -p, --platform <platform>       Target platform (maccatalyst, android, ios, windows) [default: maccatalyst]
  --json                          Output as JSON (auto-enabled when stdout is piped/redirected) [default: False]
  --no-json                       Force human-readable output even when piped [default: False]
  --version                       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help                  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  cdp            Blazor WebView automation via Chrome DevTools Protocol
  MAUI           Native MAUI app automation commands
  update-skill   Download the latest maui-ai-debugging skill from GitHub
  skill-version  Check the installed skill version and compare with remote
  broker         Manage the MauiDevFlow broker daemon
  list           List all connected agents
  wait           Wait for an agent to connect to the broker
  batch          Execute commands from stdin with JSONL responses on stdout
  version        Show CLI version information
  commands       List all available commands (machine-readable schema discovery)
  mcp-serve      Start MCP (Model Context Protocol) server for AI agent integration via stdio

Description:
  Blazor WebView automation via Chrome DevTools Protocol

Usage:
  MauiDevFlow.CLI cdp [command] [options]

Options:
  -w, --webview <webview>         Target WebView by index, AutomationId, or element ID (default: first WebView) []
  -ap, --agent-port <agent-port>  Agent HTTP port (auto-discovered via broker, .mauidevflow, or default 9223) [default: 9223]
  -ah, --agent-host <agent-host>  Agent HTTP host [default: localhost]
  -p, --platform <platform>       Target platform (maccatalyst, android, ios, windows) [default: maccatalyst]
  --json                          Output as JSON (auto-enabled when stdout is piped/redirected) [default: False]
  --no-json                       Force human-readable output even when piped [default: False]
  -?, -h, --help                  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  Browser   Browser domain commands
  Runtime   Runtime domain commands
  DOM       DOM domain commands
  Page      Page domain commands
  Input     Input domain commands
  status    Check CDP connection status
  snapshot  Get simplified DOM snapshot with element refs
  webviews  List available CDP WebViews
  source    Get page HTML source from a WebView
